summary: Applied ADR 0208 as a repository-only rollout by moving shared helpers under platform/, removing outward platform imports into scripts/, wiring explicit composition roots at the CLI and Windmill edges, and adding dependency-direction enforcement to the local and remote validation gate surfaces.

verification.observed: `make validate-dependency-direction` passed, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh dependency-direction data-models architecture-fitness workstream-surfaces agent-standards` passed on the latest `origin/main` replay after the workstream registry and dependency-direction surfaces were refreshed.

`UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema --with httpx --with cryptography --with fastapi --with pydantic python -m pytest ... -q` passed for 146 tests covering the validator, gate wiring, correction-loop and mutation-audit refactors, runbook/API gateway use-case wiring, session/run namespace wrappers, closure-loop composition-root wiring, diff engine adapters, goal compiler, CLI loop behavior, and interface contracts.

notes: This is a repository-only live rollout. No host or service converge and no platform_version update are required for ADR 0208.

The workstream branch intentionally leaves protected integration files for merge-to-main: VERSION, release sections in changelog.md, and any README.md integrated-status update if the final integrator decides one is warranted.
versions/stack.yaml should remain unchanged for ADR 0208 because the change enforces repository architecture and validation, not live platform state.

The latest-main replay also exercised the full validation entrypoint; remaining non-ADR-0208 failures before the main integration step were pre-existing ansible-lint warnings in untouched role files and stale/generated docs portal surfaces that require protected canonical-truth updates on main.
